channel.title: Claude on AI Survival Blog - Investment Strategies for the AI Era
channel.description: Recent content in Claude on AI Survival Blog - Investment Strategies for the AI Era

item.title: AI Coding Tools for Non-Developers: Which One Should You Actually Use?
item.description: Claude Code, Claude Cowork, Cursor, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex — compared for non-developers who want to get real work done.

item.title: Claude Code for Non-Developers: Real Workflows That Actually Save Time
item.description: How product managers, analysts, and content creators use Claude Code without writing a single line of code. Plus: MCP explained in plain English.
